_meta.description: CORTEX architecture graph — Phase C (Venture Machine). One entry per component. Consumed by FAISS for on-demand architecture recall. Updated at end of each Phase build.
_meta.how_to_use: Query FAISS with 'architecture', 'how does X work', 'what calls Y', 'where is Z defined' to retrieve relevant entries.

components.description: Core living knowledge entity for a venture. 8-dimension CVS scoring, health pulse, two SurfSense spaces, disk persistence.
components.persistence: usr/memory/cortex_main/ventures/{safe_name}.json — via save_venture() / load_venture() / list_ventures() module functions
components.failure_pattern: FailurePattern schema defined but DORMANT in Phase C — activates Phase G epistemic flywheel
components.cross_venture: CrossVenturePattern — output of synthesize_cross_venture_patterns() — pushed to cortex_cross_venture SurfSense space

components.description: Thread-safe SQLite-backed ledger for venture outcomes, decisions, and Kelly capital signals.
components.db_path: usr/memory/cortex_main/cortex_ledger.db — derived from agent_memory_subdir via get_ledger(agent)
components.singleton: get_ledger(agent) — process-wide singleton keyed by db_path
components.kelly_math: Ported from omnis_v12_JARVIS kelly_mathematical_framework.py. Full Kelly + half-Kelly. EV formula: p*(Rs-C) + (1-p)*(Rf-C). Kelly fraction capped at 25%.
components.record_venture_creation: Convenience method — call at CONFIRMATION step with VentureDNA instance. Records DecisionEvent with CVS at time of decision.

components.description: Domain-agnostic market research scanner. Tier 1 (Tavily+Exa via orchestrator) and Tier 2 (Perplexity). Gap analysis, cost gate, TrendReport→VentureDNA bridge.
components.gap_analysis: analyze_gaps() calls DeepSeek V3.2 to identify unanswered questions. Returns ResearchGap list. High-importance gaps trigger Tier 2.
components.tier2_gate: should_gate_tier2() returns (should_gate, estimated_cost). Gate fires if est_cost > $0.10. Manual 'use tier 2' bypasses gate.
components.dna_bridge: merge_trend_report_into_dna(dna, report) — merges TrendReport into VentureDNA: updates market_intelligence, competitor_profiles, open_questions, adds ResearchSnapshot, recomputes research_certainty

components.description: 9-step iterative venture creation flow. LLM calls this tool; state persisted via agent.set_data('venture_creation_session', dict).

actions.start: venture_name + description → parse brief → pull L1/L2/L3 memory → Tier 1 research → gap analysis → first brain-picking question
actions.continue: handles all mid-flow steps: brain-picking answers, tier2 gate, synthesis review, iteration feedback, crystallization review
actions.skip_tier2: skip Tier 2, go straight to synthesis
actions.confirm: CONFIRMATION step — persist DNA, create SurfSense spaces, push Graphiti episode, record to OutcomeLedger, trigger cross-venture synthesis, set active venture

creation_flow: INITIATION: parse brief, pull memory context
BRAIN_PICKING: ask user gap-filling questions one by one
TIER2_GATE: show cost estimate if confidence<0.6 and est_cost>$0.10
TIER2_RESEARCH: deep Perplexity research on high-importance gaps
SYNTHESIS: build VentureDNA + score CVS via DeepSeek + CORTEX capability lens
ITERATION: user feedback → refine → up to 3 iterations
CRYSTALLIZATION: finalize DNA, render CVS visual + health pulse
CONFIRMATION: persist all, create spaces, push everywhere
components.cortex_capability_lens: _apply_capability_lens() — scores ai_setup_autonomy, ai_run_autonomy, risk_level by evaluating venture through CORTEX's actual tool capabilities

components.description: Venture management: list, status, health pulse, activate, deactivate, delete, CVS visual, Kelly signal.
components.active_venture_fallback: If no venture_name given, uses agent.get_data('active_venture_name'). Falls back to most recently modified venture.

components.description: Injects active venture DNA summary (200 chars) into loop_data.extras_persistent['cortex_venture_context'] every turn.
components.execution_order: Runs after _05_self_model_load.py (which loads self-model + Tier 0 SurfSense index)
components.data_injected: VentureDNA.brief_summary(200) + CVS score + open question count + AI autonomy scores + SurfSense space names
components.cost: One disk read per turn when venture is active. Negligible.

components.description: Updated with two-space venture routing. venture_dna_space(name) and venture_ops_space(name) return correct space names. route_for_push() now routes ops_doc=True to ops space.
components.push_routing: document metadata.ops_doc=True → ops space. Default → dna space. Credentials never pushed.
components.space_naming: cortex_venture_{safe_name}_dna and cortex_venture_{safe_name}_ops. safe_name = lowercase alphanum, underscores, max 40 chars.

components.description: After each venture CONFIRMATION, background task synthesizes patterns across all ventures via DeepSeek V3.2 and pushes to cortex_cross_venture SurfSense space.
components.output: List[CrossVenturePattern] — pushed to cortex_cross_venture SurfSense space

per_turn_venture_context: → injected into system prompt by Agent Zero extras_persistent mechanism

monologue_start: _05_self_model_load.py — loads self-model JSON + Tier 0 SurfSense routing index
_07_venture_context.py (NEW C-6) — injects active venture DNA summary
message_loop_prompts_after: _20_surfsense_pull.py — SurfSense L3 pull (3 spaces, 10 docs, keyword scoring, top 5)
process_chain_end: _10_surfsense_push.py — session summarize → push to SurfSense (every 20 exchanges)
